segment: Series A/B AI SaaS teams selling to enterprise buyers without dedicated GRC staff
trigger: A live procurement, security, or legal review asks AI-specific questions during an active deal
promisedOutcome: Publish a cited buyer packet from the first AI review without standing up a full trust program
proofAsset: Passing production smoke flow, review-room screenshots, and buyer-packet artifact
channel: Founder-led outbound plus warm operator and investor intros
successEvent: A prospect agrees to run one live or recent buyer review through Proofline and reaches a published packet

segment: Fractional security and GRC consultants serving AI startups
trigger: The consultant is repeatedly pulled into ad hoc AI trust reviews for startup clients
promisedOutcome: Use one repeatable review-room workflow to standardize proof gathering and packet output across clients
proofAsset: Demo walkthrough, packet artifact, and explicit gap-task workflow
channel: Direct consultant outreach and partner referrals
successEvent: A consultant brings one startup client into a live review teardown
